posts.text:
Last night on TV, there were VERY important admissions by @Scaramucci & @lloydblankfein.

When oligarchs start warning about oligarchy, it’s proof the work shifting the Overton Window has succeeded.

The question now is whether Dems can be forced to respond to the opportunity.
Billionaire @lloydblankfein seems to have stumbled onto a realization that most of his fellow oligarchs haven’t figured out.

More here 

sirota.substack.com/p/when-o…

Full piece and video clips here 

sirota.substack.com/p/when-o…

Anthony Scaramucci has discovered the Master Plan




Blue Georgia (@BlueATLGeorgia)

Anthony Scaramucci: There's something called Citizens United, where, since January of 2010, you're allowed to give unlimited money to the politicians. It's up eight times and 36% of the donations are coming from the top 0.1%.

Monopoly busting is something that was done in the beginning, and we're not doing it anymore because of the undue influence of these people.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/BlueATLGeo

Polymarket (@Polymarket)

JUST IN: President Trump says if he could come back as anyone else in history to experience their life, he’d choose himself.



— https://nitter.net/Polymarket/status/2032530876253311466#m

The Trump mayhem plugged into social media algorithms, AI & a media vertically monopolized by oligarchs is creating a society-wide civilization-destroying mental health crisis that will last the rest of our lives & probably the rest of the next generation’s lives, too.

🚨NEWS: The prosecutor that Trump's DOJ appointed to investigate the Epstein Files was the chairman of - and has ongoing investments in - one of the major companies that has a potentially huge financial stake in the probe's outcome, according to documents reviewed by @LeverNews.

WOW: In his 2026 primary, Senator John @Hickenlooper just dropped out of his state's Democratic caucus/assembly because he had so little support.

The guy has been in office for almost a quarter century & yet has so little party support he has to drop out of the process. Wow.

Let me repeat: The only way to stop a war is to defund it.

Pass it on.




Dave Brown (@dave_brown24)

🚨The Pentagon is moving a Marine expeditionary unit to the Middle East, as Iran steps up its attacks on the Strait of Hormuz. Hegseth has approved a request from Central Command for the expeditionary unit, typically consisting of up to 2,500 Marines wsj.com/livecoverage/us-isra… @laraseligman




— https://nitter.net/dave_brown24/status/2032471536536330336#m

There was a hugely important moment on TV last night. 

When oligarchs start warning about oligarchy, it’s a sign that all the work to shift the Overton Window hasn’t been in vain.

The big question now is whether Dems can be forced to respond to the opportunity.

sirota.substack.com/p/when-oliga...

To put it mildly, the Trump mayhem plugged into social media algorithms, AI hallucinations & a media vertically monopolized by oligarchs is creating a society-wide civilization-destroying mental health crisis that will last the rest of our lives & probably the rest of the next generation’s lives too
Good to see The Lever's reporting on the Epstein files spotlighted in today’s New York Times.
What stage of the dystopia is this?

🎧LEVER TIME: A radio station is suddenly broadcasting numbers in Farsi. Is the Iranian regime signaling to sleeper cells in America?

Is Trump suppressing warnings about an imminent attack on the homeland?

On the Lever Time podcast, I talk to natsec reporter @shaneharris.bsky.social to get answers.

A day after a poll shows California voters want to tax oligarchs, the oligarchs announced plans to simply buy all of California's elections. 

What stage of oligarchy is this?

You think you know how America became so endemically corrupt.

But you don't know the half of it, because that story hasn't been public...until now.  

Watch, learn - and pass it on.

Season 2 launches on 3/16.

🚨BIG STORY: The prosecutor that Trump's DOJ appointed to investigate the Epstein Files was the chairman of - and has ongoing investments in - one of the major companies that has a potentially huge financial stake in the probe's outcome, according to documents reviewed by @levernews.com.
.

I see that amid the Senate housing debate, Online Marketing Specialist Matt Yglesias & some Dems are pretending that oligarchs & billionaires owning lots of housing isnt part of what's driving the housing crisis.

This is, to put it bluntly, a brazen & provable lie, as shown by Federal Reserve data.

NEWS: Trump officials are floating a supplemental spending bill for the Iran War - while Pete Hegseth’s Pentagon just spent $6.9 million on lobster in a single month, $1,844 on an office chair, $26,000 on “sushi preparation tables” & $98,329 on a grand piano. 

www.levernews.com/cvs-threaten...

🚨INVESTIGATION: A criminal trial involving Marco Rubio is exposing a foreign influence scheme & the Trump figures who profited off shaping U.S.-Venezuela policy, according to court documents reviewed by @levernews.com. 

@lukewgoldstein.bsky.social's story here: www.levernews.com/the-miami-tr...

🚨EXCLUSIVE: A criminal case featuring Marco Rubio is exposing a stealth foreign influence peddling system that allegedly involved key Trumpworld figures — including Trump’s White House chief of staff — who profited shaping US-Venezuela policy, according to court documents reviewed by @levernews.com.
Democrats must defund Trump’s imperial war | David Sirota, Jared Jacang Maher, Laura Krantz and Ron S Doyle

Here is @rokhanna.bsky.social explicitly calling out Democrats who are trying to pretend to be against Trump's Iran War but who suggest they may vote to fund that war.

www.theguardian.com/commentisfre...

A different way to say this is: Bernie is the Goldwater — he lost the presidential race but won the larger ideological battle inside the party. 

Those of us on the populist side who've endured shaming & hate from corporate libs for 30 years — we won. 

The corporatists have lost — at least for now.

The health care system is a disaster thanks both to GOP obstruction AND to Dems using a near-supermajority to marginalize Medicare for All & create a public-option-free Heritage Foundation-style ACA empowering insurers to enrich themselves & fleece everyone else.

Thanks for attending my TED talk.

🚨NEWS: A surveillance giant getting government contracts is trying to block its own shareholders from voting to force execs to disclose dark money spending.

Trump's SEC is boosting such efforts to kill these initiatives & create a precedent letting companies more easily hide political spending.

Liberal pundits/influencers like this are thisclose to getting it - but they still can't let themselves take the next step. 

They still can't let themselves understand how turning hope & change into more of the same was a key moment of demoralization that catalyzed the subsequent disaster.

Serious question: If you are allegedly so much smarter than everyone else in realizing that politics is meaningless and nothing can possibly change, then why are you also spending most of your finite time alive logging onto websites like this to post comments about politics?
LEVER WEEKLY: Secret Agent, Man  (by The Lever). Foreign-influence schemes, AI seat assignments, and more from The Lever this week.
YOU LOVE TO SEE IT: Go Ahead, Just Look Up!  (by Lyna Bentahar). A spacecraft crashes for mankind, lawmakers take gunmakers to court, broadband access gets broader, and a big state buys up bad debt.
Where Is The Pentagon’s Money Going?  (by Lyna Bentahar). Test your knowledge of the Iran war, entertainment monopolies, and other issues that really matter.

Donate TEst  (by Nick Byron Campbell). Donate To The Lever













Hold the powerful accountable with a donation. Give a one-time donation in any amount to fund The Lever‘s mission to hold the powerful accountable through reader-supported investigative journalism. Every cent helps.






Donate Now





Tip Jar





Help Us Do More Stories Like This





We're

The Epstein Prosecutor With A Portfolio Problem  (by Freddy Brewster). As Trump’s top Wall Street prosecutor, Jay Clayton is spearheading Epstein and Venezuela legal efforts — while holding investments in companies with a stake in such matters.
Utilities Cash In On America’s Energy Crisis  (by Veronica Riccobene). Profits hit $186 billion between 2021 and 2024 as electricity and gas margins outperformed other industries.
New War, Same Neocons  (by Katya Schwenk). The new Iran war follows a road map drafted by a revived neocon network of Iraq War defense hawks, Israel lobby allies, and dark money groups.
Did Iran Just Launch A Shadow War On American Soil? . Trump attacked Iran. That’s when a mysterious radio broadcast in Farsi began.
No Kings: One Year Later…Where Do We Go From Here?  (by The Lever). Together, we’ll tackle the question facing the country right now: How do you confront a presidency that operates without limits?

CVS Threatens Tennessee Over Antitrust Crackdown  (by Veronica Riccobene). The conglomerate has pledged to close all 134 of its locations in the state if lawmakers attempt to rein in its sprawling health business.
The Only Way To Stop Trump’s Mad War . Trump’s Iran war is the culmination of a decades-long master plan — and only Congress has the power to end it.
War As An Investment Strategy  (by Veronica Riccobene). Private equity is looking to get its cut of the wartime economy.

The Miami Trial Exposing Foreign Influence In Trumpland  (by Luke Goldstein). Inside a $50 million Venezuelan lobbying deal and a court battle ensnaring White House power brokers — including Secretary of State Marco Rubio and chief of staff Susie Wiles.
How To Save The World  (by Veronica Riccobene). Here’s how Congress can stop Trump from initiating nuclear armageddon.
No Surveilling The Surveillance Giant  (by Veronica Riccobene). A weapons and surveillance juggernaut doesn’t want its own political influence strategy tracked.

Did Iran Just Launch A Shadow War On American Soil? (With Shane Harris). When American bombs dropped on Iran, a mysterious shortwave radio station began broadcasting a list of numbers in Farsi across the globe. Reminiscent of Cold War spy communications, the broadcast raises serious questions: Where is the broadcast coming from, and who is listening to it? Is Iran sendin

Who Sold America On The Iran War? (With Hooman Majd & Ryan Grim). On February 28, the United States and Israel began bombing Iran — with no congressional declaration, public debate, or clear endgame. For those who grew up watching the Ayatollah cast as America’s original supervillain on the nightly news, it wasn’t exactly a surprise. Donald Trump pitched the idea

The Court Disarmed Trump’s Tariff Weapon. Who Will Pay? (With Lori Wallach). On Friday, the Supreme Court ruled that President Donald Trump’s tariffs were illegal, striking a blow to his favorite geopolitical strategy. The decision could make it far harder for any president to wield tariffs as a weapon, but how will the ruling affect your wallet?

He Sent One Email. Then Federal Agents Came To His Door. . In October, a Philadelphia man emailed an attorney for the Department of Homeland Security, criticizing a government policy. Hours later, federal agents and local police were banging on his door to interrogate him without a warrant. It feels like something out of a movie, but it's real.

In Part Three of What Tech Wants, Lever Time’s investigation into why Silicon Valley

What Tech Wants: Crypto Reign Of Terror (with Jacob Silverman and Molly White). In 2024, the cryptocurrency industry spent more than $130 million to influence elections nationwide. Their campaign donations and lobbying efforts turned the tables for their risky boom-and-bust business, which is now poised to overtake our entire financial system.
